---
metadata-files:
    - virt-check/step.yaml
    - install/install-short/step.yaml
    - install/define-xml/step.yaml
    - disk/step.yaml
    - domain/step.yaml
    - resources/step.yaml
    - lifecycle/step.yaml
    - autostart/step.yaml
    - snapshot/step.yaml
    - backup/step.yaml
    - network/step.yaml
    - pool/step.yaml
---

# Libvirt

{{< include _assigment-description.qmd >}}

## Задания

### {{< meta virt-check.title >}}
{{< include virt-check/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include virt-check/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta install-short.title >}}
{{< include install/install-short/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include install/install-short/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta define-xml.title >}}
{{< include install/define-xml/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include install/define-xml/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta disk.title >}}
{{< include disk/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include disk/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta domain.title >}}
{{< include domain/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include domain/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta resources.title >}}
{{< include resources/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include resources/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta lifecycle.title >}}
{{< include lifecycle/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include lifecycle/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta autostart.title >}}
{{< include autostart/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include autostart/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta snapshot.title >}}
{{< include snapshot/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include snapshot/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta backup.title >}}
{{< include backup/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include backup/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta network.title >}}
{{< include network/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include network/_task.qmd >}}

### {{< meta pool.title >}}
{{< include pool/_theory.qmd >}}
{{< include pool/_task.qmd >}}
